brief: Add full-text search to GET /bookmarks via ?q= query parameter. Search matches against title and url, case-insensitive.
acceptance_criteria: GET /bookmarks?q=term returns only bookmarks where title or url contains term
Empty or missing q returns all bookmarks
Works in combination with existing ?tag= filter
oracle_test: Create 3 bookmarks with distinct titles. GET /bookmarks?q=<substring> returns only matching ones. GET /bookmarks?q=UPPER matches lowercase.
